title: Resume Architecture, Evidence Statements, and Machine-Robust Delivery · Opportunity Brief: Experience Translation
summary: A resume uses decorative columns, keyword blocks, vague adjectives, unsupported impact numbers, and identical content for every role. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the experience translation increment in truthful role-targeted resume system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate projects, education, open source, community work, care, career change, and employment into relevant evidence without hiding provenance.
Write concise action, context, decision, behavior, result, and evidence statements without false causality or invented metrics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Experience Translation · Theory Experience Translation
steps.instruction:
theory case — A two-column resume contains vague adjectives, hidden text, inconsistent dates, unsupported percentages, broken links, and a PDF with scrambled extraction order. The theory variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: defend one bounded career decision

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Experience Translation contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Experience Translation · Theory Experience Translation.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for translate projects, education, open source, community work, care, career change, and employment into relevant evidence without hiding provenance. For Predict Experience Translation · Theory Experience Translation, keep Experience Translation connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.text: A two-column resume contains vague adjectives, hidden text, inconsistent dates, unsupported percentages, broken links, and a PDF with scrambled extraction order. options.text: Translate projects, education, open source, community work, care, career change, and employment into relevant evidence without hiding provenance. Apply it to the concrete input and state the observable result.
Unpaid or nontraditional experience belongs nowhere on a technical resume. That claim fails the predict experience translation evidence boundary for Experience Translation.

For predict experience translation, apply Experience Translation without its stated preconditions, omit the truthful role-targeted resume system trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Experience Translation for truthful role-targeted resume system.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence. Apply that move specifically to Experience Translation while producing truthful role-targeted resume system.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A two-column resume contains vague adjectives, hidden text, inconsistent dates, unsupported percentages, broken links, and a PDF with scrambled extraction order. The worked example variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Translate projects, education, open source, community work, care, career change, and employment into relevant evidence without hiding provenance. A defensible solution applies Experience Translation, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to truthful role-targeted resume system.

content.code:
# Worked focus: career-experience-translation — Translate projects, education, open source, community work, care, career change, and employment into relevant evidence without hiding provenance.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-4
focus: career-experience-translation
decision-evidence: Translate projects, education, open source, community work, care, career change, and employment into relevant evidence without hiding provenance.
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Unpaid or nontraditional experience belongs nowhere on a technical resume. This fails the Experience Translation contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.value: GitHub Healthy Contributions Guidance (GitHub Docs current 2026-07-15) — Controls README, contribution, conduct, license, support, governance, issue-template, and stewardship signals without equating activity volume with quality.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Translate projects, education, open source, community work, care, career change, and employment into relevant evidence without hiding provenance.
